dependencies: Natural bovine tissue from United States and Australia for pericardial tissue valve products
Single source suppliers for certain materials and components due to regulatory requirements
Reliance on third parties for raw materials, organic materials, and sterilization
risks: Supply interruptions due to vendor financial viability
Vendors electing to no longer service medical technology companies
Limitation or ban of certain chemicals or materials
Delays or shortages due to trade or regulatory embargoes
Significant cost increases in raw materials due to inflation, supply constraints, tariffs, or regulatory changes
Difficulty establishing replacement sources due to rigorous FDA and regulatory requirements
Dependence on animal tissue (bovine) with BSE concerns

regulatory_risks: FDA regulatory approval delays or denials for new products and modifications
European Union Medical Device Regulation (MDR) compliance and re-certification requirements
Mutual Recognition Agreement (MRA) between EU and Switzerland not finalized, impacting device movement
Japanese Pharmaceuticals and Medical Devices Agency approval requirements
Changes in reimbursement policies by CMS and third-party payors
Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA) compliance
General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) compliance in EU
California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) and California Privacy Rights Act (CRPA) compliance
Anti-kickback laws and Stark law compliance
Physician Payments Sunshine Act disclosure requirements
False Claims Act and healthcare fraud statutes
United States Foreign Corrupt Practices Act compliance
United Kingdom Bribery Act compliance
Environmental, health, and safety regulations
Climate change regulations and greenhouse gas emission requirements
Product liability and recall regulations
Clinical trial regulations and Good Clinical Practices standards
Quality system regulations (ISO 13485:2016)
Medical device reporting regulations
Import/export controls and restrictions
Tax law changes including OECD Base Erosion and Profit Shifting Pillar Two (global minimum tax)
Affordable Care Act implementation and potential future healthcare legislation
21st Century Cures Act compliance

sanction_risks: Trade protection measures, quotas, embargoes, import/export requirements
Duties, tariffs, and surcharges impacting international operations
Military conflict, political unrest, or wars affecting operations
Israel Tax Authority disputes and assessments
